title: S33R Rainbow Amethyst (Mizunos)
description: Gives each amethyst crystal stage a unique color.
body:
Do you find it difficult to discern the different stages of amethyst growth, and end up breaking a cluster and getting nothing because it was actually a large crystal and not a larger, fully grown one? This resource pack will help you identify the stages easier using colors! Going from red for the smallest stage, to yellow then green, and finally having a fully grown blue and pink crystal to let you know when you can break the amethyst cluster. This resource pack also slightly alters the color of the amethyst shard and block.

This resource pack does not require Optifine to use and is made for version 1.17 and up.

This pack has a version for Bedrock [here](https://www.mediafire.com/file/duvo8v7vttqhy5b/S33R+Rainbow+Amethyst+Bedrock+Ver.MCPACK/file) and a version for Vanilla Minecraft textures [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/s33r-rainbow-amethyst).

This pack has been adjusted to match the Mizunos 16 resource pack. I do not own the original textures in that pack, which can be found [here](https://mizunomcmemo.blogspot.com/p/cit.html).

~ Seer
